case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS WEISS STEPHEN M et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEISS STEPHEN M
